mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE id=#{userId} AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT id FROM conversation WHERE user_a=#{userA} AND user_b=#{userB}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversation WHERE id=#{conversationId} AND (user_a=#{userId} OR user_b=#{userId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_block WHERE (user_id=#{firstUserId} AND blocked_user_id=#{secondUserId}) OR (user_id=#{secondUserId} AND blocked_user_id=#{firstUserId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversation WHERE user_a=#{userId} OR user_b=#{userId}

SELECT c.id,CASE WHEN c.user_a=#{userId} THEN c.user_b ELSE c.user_a END peer_user_id, u.nickname peer_nickname,u.avatar peer_avatar,c.last_message_preview,c.last_message_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message m WHERE m.conversation_id=c.id AND m.to_user_id=#{userId} AND m.is_read=FALSE AND m.is_deleted=FALSE) unread_count FROM conversation c JOIN app_user u ON u.id=CASE WHEN c.user_a=#{userId} THEN c.user_b ELSE c.user_a END WHERE c.user_a=#{userId} OR c.user_b=#{userId} ORDER BY c.last_message_at DESC,c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE conversation_id=#{conversationId} AND is_deleted=FALSE

SELECT id,conversation_id,from_user_id,to_user_id,content,is_read,read_at,created_at FROM message WHERE conversation_id=#{conversationId} AND is_deleted=FALSE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read=TRUE,read_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE conversation_id=#{conversationId} AND to_user_id=#{userId} AND is_read=FALSE AND is_deleted=FALSE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_block WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND blocked_user_id=#{blockedUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_block WHERE user_id=#{userId}
SELECT u.id,u.nickname,u.avatar,b.created_at blocked_at FROM user_block b JOIN app_user u ON u.id=b.blocked_user_id WHERE b.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY b.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_report WHERE reporter_user_id=#{reporterUserId} AND target_type=#{targetType} AND target_id=#{targetId}

SELECT CASE WHEN #{targetType}=1 THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message m JOIN conversation c ON c.id=m.conversation_id WHERE m.id=#{targetId} AND (c.user_a=#{reporterUserId} OR c.user_b=#{reporterUserId})) WHEN #{targetType}=2 THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversation c WHERE c.id=#{targetId} AND (c.user_a=#{reporterUserId} OR c.user_b=#{reporterUserId})) ELSE 0 END
